As "Shadow of Malevolence" is dated to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] by {{FactFile2014|24|22 BBY 87-88|The ''Malevolence'' Campaign}}, the Battle of Rendili must also occur in that year.</ref> {{C|originally 30 months ABG}}

'''''Republic'' 71''' is the seventy-first issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[November 24]], [[2004]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''The action is fast and furious as the Jedi pull out all stops to prevent the Separatists from commandeering the mighty Rendili Fleet''.

''Anakin Skywalker and renegade Jedi Quinlan Vos team up in their starfighters, Vos is finally captured and brought to justice for his crimes, and Anakin has what he hopes will be a final showdown with dark Jedi Asajj Ventress high above the dark alleys of Coruscant!''

''Against the backdrop of the Clone Wars, dark deeds are made to seem right, so that even a Jedi might condone revenge!''

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|comic}}

==Continuity==
In this issue, Anakin receives slash wounds from Asajj Ventress as she toys with him in a lightsaber duel. These are the same scars Anakin wears beside his right eye and left cheek in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. With the release of the [[2008]] [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]], however, Anakin is depicted with these scars two years prior, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

When [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] sends the [[Insect mimic message droid|message droid]] to [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]], [[Aurebesh/Legends|Aurebesh]] symbols appear on various signs.
